name: Drytron Gamma Eltanin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜輝巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドライトロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－エル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>γ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ガンマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with the effect of a "Drytron" card. You can Tribute 1 other "Drytron" monster, or 1 Ritual Monster, from your hand or field; Special Summon this card from your hand or GY in Defense Position, then you can Special Summon 1 "Drytron" monster with 2000 ATK from your GY, except "Drytron Gamma Eltanin". You cannot Special Summon monsters, except monsters that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set, the turn you activate this effect. You can only use this effect of "Drytron Gamma Eltanin" once per turn.
